entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 3
entry.content:
Hello,

Here is my solution:

entry.title: Re: Why I love SAP and Blockchain Databases and why you should too 🚀
entry.content:
There are going to be a lot of blogs in this series, we will go through the whole Enterprise Blockchain subject from top to bottom and left to right including the how to do the use cases.

Enterprise Blockchain is soooo important for SAP Customers, it offers such an opportunity to make complex Data Security and Data Integration much easier, it is such a useful and at the same time misunderstood technology and we are going to do our bit to help fix that.

A simple reminder, 

The Digital Transformation of Information Security is Enterprise Blockchain

Enterprise Blockchain is the Next Generation Data Integrity, Originality, Confidentiality Protection

Enterprise Blockchain, Enterprise Distributed Ledger Technology is re-imagining information security

Here are the blogs in this series:

SAP Enterprise Architecture: Positioning Blockchain Database as an Enterprise Technology Standard 🚀

SAP Enterprise Architecture: Let the Use Case find the Blockchain🚀

Oil & Gas - Ultimate Data Security - Blockchain Data Backbone from OT to SAP IT🚀

The What Is... The Why To... The How To... of: ESG & SAP & Enterprise Blockchain 🚀

there are a lot more to come, use cases, deep dives into aspects of the technology and architecture, how many tenants to have on a Enterprise Blockchain Network for SAP for different use cases, Configurable Consensus, Enterprise Blockchain at the Edge, Enterprise Blockchain as a DataStore, Blockchain for Data Communication, Event Driven Blockchain, when to use which type of Enterprise Blockchain and much more...

entry.title: bug in BAPI_CUSTOMERCONTRACT_CHANGE
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am encountering a puzzling issue while attempting to modify contract data using the BAPI_CUSTOMERCONTRACT_CHANGE function module. Despite carefully passing the appropriate data, including setting the update flag in the conditions_inx structure to 'U', the BAPI seems to only modify item 10 and create additional step numbers.

Here's a snippet of the code I've used:

```abap
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_CUSTOMERCONTRACT_CHANGE'
EXPORTING
salesdocument = contract
contract_header_in = contract_header_in
contract_header_inx = contract_header_inx
logic_switch = logic_switch
TABLES
return = return
contract_item_in = it_contract
contract_item_inx = it_contractx
partnerchanges = it_partner_change
conditions_in = it_cond
conditions_inx = it_condx.
```

Despite setting the update flag correctly (`updateflag = 'U'`), it appears that only item 10 gets updated, and additional step numbers are created unexpectedly.

Has anyone in the community encountered a similar issue before? Is this a known product limitation, or could it be an issue with the configuration or data setup? Any insights, suggestions, or guidance on how to address this problem would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards,
Jay D

entry.title: Re: How to create and use URL Parameters in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Dear @rohitchouhan, thank you so much for providing this insightful blog! When I use url parameters like in your blog on desktop, it works on my SAC. But my use case is parsing url parameters in iOS mobile app. We are running 2024.2.14 (Client), 2024.2.8 (Server) with the most recent mobile app version 2.161.0.

I use the following syntax with a replacement for the placeholders:

sap-analytics-cloud://<CUSTOMDOMAIN>.eu10.<CUSTOM>.cloud.sap/?type=story&id=<STORY-ID>&tenantId=<TENANT>&mode=view&p_year=2023&p_salesorg=1234&p_customer=1234

The app opens the story but does not show any values for my script variable. I also checked the logs provided by the mobile app but did not find any relevant information. Do you have any idea what is wrong with my configuration? Reading the help provided by SAP did not help me.

Thank you very much!

Best regards, Andreas

entry.title: Re: "Will Advise" Purchase Orders
entry.content: I have the same issue here. If someone knows a better practice on this. I will be much appreciated.

entry.title: PS:Budget check not happening for 'Reservation for WBS elem' materials
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

Please help me in solving the following issue I have in relation to Budget check in Project:

1. Material M1 is attached with Procurement Type "Reservation for WBS element" as the requirement in network activity.

Result: No budget check.

Availability Control Analysis: COSP 2024 01 0000803101 KPPE D INR 275.000,00 INR B

2. Transferring Material M1 from general inventory to Q inventory.

Result: no corresponding budget checks.

Availability Control Analysis: nothing happened

Ignoring budget checks can lead to unchecked spending, which may quickly erode the project's financial margins.

I need the user exit or enhancement to solve this issue.

Please help.

entry.title: Sequencing of spools for different inbound deliveries
entry.content:
BADI COMPLETE_PROC_PPF has been implemented to send the PPF triggers in qRFC based on the inbound delivery number. For all PPF triggers of a particular IBD, they are sent in a qRFC in the order in which they are received. 

Now, when multiple deliveries are distributed from VL06i, the order of spools is random whereas the expectation is that it should be based on the inbound delivery number. All the spools of 1 IBD should be printed and then the printing of next IBD should start. 

When we print the delivery from /SCWM/MON, the order of spools for a single delivery is correct. Before the implementation of BADI, this order was also random.

27 warehouse orders are created for 12 inbound deliveries. The expectation is that the sequence of printouts should be based on the inbound delivery number. 

BADI - 

Please advise.

entry.title: Re: Variant Configuration Simple Method Step by Step
entry.content: thx for the document, its very helpfull for me

entry.title: Footer Calculations in a Crosstab not working as expected
entry.content:
Hi,

I am really hoping someone can assist me with what I assumed would be a really simple count calculation, but has become a real pain - probably because I am a bit of a noob. I have hunted through this forum and all over google and I cannot find an answer to my problem.

So, I have a Crosstab that has been created using two queries and ultimately the report is tracking pupil progress for each course. I have attached a screenshot to give an idea of what I am working with. I’ve had to fill it with fake data for data protection reasons.

 

So in the screenshot attached, the rows contain the pupil level data and the columns contain course level data. The columns are broken down by Course AND Level. In the body of the Crosstab, is a measure with the formula as follows:

=If(IsNull([Working Grade]) And ([Level] InList (“NAT3”; “NAT4”;“NAT5”;“HIGH”;“ADVH”));0;[Working Grade])

The Y/N columns (I know they aren’t officially columns, but actually rows) are each calculated using a bunch of measures (I don’t know if you need this info, but I’m including it just in case)

Column1 (after the first ‘columns’ Forename, Surname and ID)
=If(Sum([vPassAC] Where ([Level] InList (“NAT3”;“NAT4”;“NAT5”;“HIGH”;“ADVH”)))>4;“Y”;“N”)

Column2
=If(Sum([vPassAC] Where ([Level] InList (“NAT4”;“NAT5”;“HIGH”;“ADVH”)))>4;“Y”;“N”)

Column3
=If(Sum([vPassAC] Where ([Level] InList (“NAT5”;“HIGH”;“ADVH”)))>4;“Y”;“N”)

Column4
=If(Min([Working Grade]Where(Left([Course];4) InList (“C724”; “C824”)))<7;“Y”;“N”)

Column5
=If(Min([Working Grade]Where(Left([Course];4) InList(“C744”;“C844”)))<7;“Y”;If(Min([Working Grade]Where(Left([Course];4) InList(“C747”;“C847”)))<7;“Y”;“N”))

Column6
=If(Concatenation([vEnglish@3A-C];[vMaths@3A-C])=“YY”;“Y”;“N”)

Now, what I want to do, is have 3 footer calculations for each of those Y/N ‘Columns’. The first footer calculation just counts how many rows there are in the report - that one is easy, I can just do a count of the ID’s. The second footer calculation is to show how many “Y”'s there are in each ‘Column’. The third footer calculation is just the second calculation/first calculation to work out the percentage. (the cells highlighted in green would be where I would start the footer calculations)

I figured it would be simple:

=Count([ID] Where(Column1 = “Y”))

But nope - I have tried about 50 different calculations, using a variety of syntaxes, but I get one of the following values: 0, 1, 199 (which is the total number of rows) or 8000 (not exactly 8000, but some crazy high number). There should be 199 rows total and the number of "Y"s should be lower than 199, but I cannot for the life of me get it to work. I don’t know if its to do with Calculation Contexts or if it’s something else entirely, but please, someone put me out of my misery

entry.title: Re: Vendor Master is Flag for Deletion, Vendor shows at t...
entry.content:
As you set deletion flag for vendor XXXXXX- you should have warning message as Vendor XXXXXXX flagged for deletion  with Message no. ME024.

You can set error message in SPRO with Message no. ME024 to restrict PO creation if vendor blocked /deleted.

entry.title: How do I easily obtain the first open posting period through the SAPB1 Service Layer?
entry.content:
Hi there,

I am trying to easily obtain the first open posting period through the SAP B1 Service Layer.

How does one get the most recent open posting period?
I have found the following endpoints:
CompanyService_GetFinancePeriods
CompanyService_GetPeriod
CompanyService_GetFinancePeriod

But I am struggling to see how I can easily get the current / next open postingperiod?

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Recently released patches/fixes for SAP MII
entry.content:
Hello Sunita
Do you have assigned URL of mii into java configuration to security->site list?

in advance: do you also have included URL of mii in browser Internet Options -> Security -> allowed sites?
regards
Matthias

entry.title: Re: In S/4 Hana Cloud, pub ed.,in Asset account. we get 3...
entry.content:
Hi,

you could add additional depreciation area now. 

As of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2208, the following new scope items are available:
5HG - Asset Accounting – Additional Depreciation Area
5KF - Asset Under Construction – Additional Depreciation Area
Prerequisite: You can only select and activate the scope item in initial scoping . It can’t be added late

best regards,

liling

entry.title: Dear Experts
entry.content:
We are using SAP S/4 HANA Cloud and needs to know what replaced tramsaction ME54N, We needs to know this app in SAP Hana Coud for our BPO be able to approve PR's on behalf of users who are unable to approve or did not set up substitutes. We have been using this transaction ME54N duiring time when we were still on SAP ECC.
Thanks
Gauta Makgopya

entry.title: SAP Continuous Influence for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Outcome of the Q1/2024 Review
entry.content:
Dear Customers and Partners, 

Since the last review cycle in November 2023, we delivered on 170 + requests across the program, many of them shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 release. 
Please note that whilst focusing on qualified requests, we also considered requests below the voting threshold, depending on strategic fit and capacity.
 
Q1/2024 Review Outcomes

For spotlights on requests addressed throughout the last review cycle, kindly check out the summary blog post for each SAP Continuous Influence session related to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

SessionReview Summary
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Asset ManagementQ1/2024
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Data Management and Data MigrationQ1/2024
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Enterprise Portfolio and Project ManagementQ1/2024
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for FinanceQ1/2024
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group ReportingQ1/2024
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for ManufacturingPending
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Professional Services AutomationQ1/2024
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for SalesQ1/2024
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and ProcurementQ1/2024
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Supply Chain LogisticsQ1/2024
SAP S/4HANA Cloud for User ExperienceQ1/2024

Thank you for your continuous feedback!

entry.title: Re: In S/4 Hana Cloud, pub ed.,in Asset account. A.Classe...
entry.content: HI, The 'Define Asset Class‘ is for you to define your own asset classes for Asset Accounting. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/227f0f8f970a44f88d6c1b875971c306.html for any pre-delivered asset class, as long as you made requisition steps as mentioned in following kba, all could be used. '2747303 - Not all asset classes available S/4HANA Cloud' https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2747303 best regars, liling

entry.title: Re: How to print documents that are added as SharePoint URL link along with maintenance orders?
entry.content:
Hi Chris,

I can help if needed, let me know if you want to get in touch, or send a request from the znk.lu site

Rgds,

Karim

entry.title: Incoming EHF invoices
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some questions regarding incoming EHF invoices entering SAP. Currently we have an integration solution that generates three different statuses in SAP, which are the following

 

1. Posted PO invoice (goods receipt must have been completed due to the GR/IV flag on POs
2. Parked PO invoice (goods receipt has not been completed or there are additional items on the invoice that must be posted manually, e.g. shipping, pallet cost, etc.). On these invoices, the PO number is not included in the SAP standard field as it is not stored in the Purchase order field unless goods receipt has been done, so we put it in "notes" so that they can manually enter it after the GR has been carried out. This results in the invoice only containing header info when it enters SAP, no lines.
3. Parked FI invoice – all FI invoices come in as parked and must be posted manually in SAP. We only get header information into SAP and the rest can be posted manually by checking the PDF attached in SAP.

The problem is that it is not a requirement that the supplier send an invoice with attachment/PDF, and when the invoices enter SAP as above, with only header information (except on fully matched PO invoices then) it becomes problematic to know how to post the invoices when they have no attachment to look at. We receive complete information from the supplier, but right now the integration is not set up so that the information can be entered automatically into some fields in SAP, as the basic idea of the solution was that accounting would take place in SAP.  One way to manage this is to make our integration create own PDFs based on the information provided electronically, but it would be better if it could be solved in a nicer way since this would result in manual work. 
 
 
We are interested in getting to know any SAP standard/best practises for EHF management or any recommendation or experience. Appreciate all answers

entry.title: Return sales order not stored in ACDOCA SO field
entry.content:
Hi,
We have valuated sales order stock where Sales order will be updated in P&L leg of accounting document like goods issue postings.
So for normal customer delivery PGI, we notice that Sales order in ACDOCA (ACDOCA-KDAUF) is getting updated correctly. (refer attached document)
However, for return sales order we notice that the return SO number is not getting updated in ACDOCA-KDAUF which is very strange and there seems to be technical flaw in this regard.

System is expected to behave in the same manner for customer returns as in case of normal forward sales order. Sales order no. is getting updated in entry view while in GL view, it is empty.
Please go through the attached document and let us know what is the reason for this inconsistent behavior.

entry.title: Re: Parameter Passing in Power BI from Datasphere
entry.content: Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Purchase Requisition doesn't create in MDBT but creat...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer the note :550568 - FAQ: Planning run (MD01, MD02, MD03, MDBT,...)

Also the below thread which discuss similar issue

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/md02-manually-is-generating-purrqs-but-mdbt-by-background-is-not/qaq-p/11646474

entry.title: HR-Brunch: HR-IT-Zielbild & SAP Strategie in Einklang bringen
entry.content:
HR-IT-Verantwortliche stehen vor der Herausforderung, die IT-Landschaft für die Personalabteilung zukunftssicher auszurichten. Die Anforderungen aller Beteiligten sowie die SAP Strategie müssen bei diesem Schritt berücksichtigt werden. Bei unserem HR-Brunch dreht sich deshalb alles um die Frage: Wie können Sie ein HR-IT-Zielbild für Ihr Unternehmen erstellen, welche Entscheidungen müssen Sie treffen  und welche Stolpersteine befinden sich auf dem Weg zu einer Lösung?

Dieses Event bietet eine einzigartige Gelegenheit für Fachleute und Führungskräfte aus dem Bereich Human Resources und IT, sich über die neuesten Entwicklungen und Strategien im HR-Bereich auszutauschen. Im Fokus steht die Verbindung zwischen der zukunftssicheren Ausrichtung eines HR-IT-Leitbilds und der SAP-Strategie.

Highlights des Events:

  • Im  Vortrag berichten unsere Experten von Best-Practices aus realen Kundenprojekten. Sie erfahren, wie Sie ein HR-IT-Zielbild erarbeiten und in Einklang mit der SAP-Strategie bringen können.
  • In einer Masterclass erarbeiten Sie zusammen mit unseren Experten einen eigenen HR-IT-Roadmap-Kickstart anhand eines echten Use-Cases.
  • Networking-Möglichkeiten mit Kollegen und potenziellen Geschäftspartnern, um wertvolle Kontakte zu knüpfen.
  • Ein reichhaltiges Brunch-Buffet mit köstlichen Speisen und erfrischenden Getränken in angenehmer Atmosphäre.

Wir laden Sie herzlich zu unserem HR-Brunch am 11.04.2024 in Essen ein. Nutzen Sie die Möglichkeit, den nächsten Schritt  zu einer zukunftsfähigen HR-IT-Landschaft zu gehen und dabei interessante Kontakte zu anderen Teilnehmenden sowie unseren Experten zu knüpfen.

Jetzt kostenlos anmelden

Bei Fragen, kontaktieren Sie uns gerne per Mail (info@activate-hr.de) oder hier.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori APP for MRP master data issues
entry.content:
I been working with this app and can see these an issue category called "Sourcing Issue" my expectation was that when MRP run, if no source of supply could be determined, we would see this in the [Display MRP Master Data Issues] App under category "S" This does not seem to be the case, the system generates a requisition without source of supply, but no issue raised.

I'm struggling to find a use case or example of what is considered a "Sourcing Issue"

Any experience of this, which you could share would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Implementation of parallel currency
entry.content:
Hello Simona,

Once the given company code is live in the system and postings are made, it's not allowed to make any changes to the currency configuration due to the fact that the underlying transaction data may gets inconsistent due to any forced action of customizing change, and consequently may not be possible to process any open invoices that exits in the system, hence it's forbidden to change such configuration in live system without proper consultation.

With reference to your current business requirement of group currency introduction in the live system, it requires database level transformation using SAP-DMLT consulting service. The steps to assess such business requirement are as follows;

- Access the Technical questionnaire from SAP support portal link :- Data Unification & Harmonization (sap.com). You will find the solution brief and questionnaire for Currency Conversion
- Download the relevant Technical Questinnaire and send the duly filled form to SAP-DMLT DL-  sap_dmlt_gce@sap.com

They will assign Engagement Architect to connect with you directly and further steps are as follows;

1. Based on the questionnaire input solution fitment will be assessed and it may require short technical assessment to evaluate the overall application usage in the system and confirm the feasibility of group currency introduction. The technical assessment in the system may take week time to complete and come-up with detailed session. From parallel currency introduction perspective, it requires to validate the application usage across FI-GL, FI-AA, CO, ML, PCA, to suggest right solution strategy. 
2. System access required with full authorization (SAP_ALL) and may also require to deploy some analysis tool, to review the existing configuration and consistency of underlying transaction data, to meet the target  TO-BE requirement.

The expected outcome of assessment and subsequent steps are as follows:

  1. Propose recommended overall approach through customer workshop
  2. Critical points that should be considered during the engagement
  3. Draft timeline for the project
  4. Estimation of efforts and formal proposal for professional consulting engagement with SAP DMLT
  5. Contract sign and project starts

All other remaining questions, please find my remarks as follows;

  • Are there SAP standard tools available for extending LC2 into active company codes?
    Ans: It should be managed through SAP professional consulting network due to database level complexity and DMLT is the right channel to engage with.
  • In case such service has to be ordered and paid – please send us price conditions for such services from SAP DMLT department
    Ans: You will have to follow aforementioned steps to get the commercial indications and involve regional sales representatives from the respective SAP local Market Unit.
  • What are restrictions for implementing LC2 (closing fiscal year, activation at the end of fiscal year……)? In case of extending LC2 in current transaction data:
    Ans: There is no year dependencies to decide the go-live date, and only limitation is previous FY should be completely audited and closed and only current FY should be open. There shouldn't be any activation of new business function like New G/L document split in the current FY where you planned to run this group currency introduction.
  • Will this be available for all historical posting documents? Which SAP modules except Finance are involved for extending LC2 into transaction data?
    Ans: Yes, it should be applicable for complete history of the data footprint using fixed exchange rate for translation. Precisely, implication of only LC2 introduction on SAP modules are FI-GL, FI-AA, ML that should be taken into account for review. However, if it's a question about group currency (30) in scope, and then additionally CO and PCA modules also needs to be looked in for completeness of scope.
  • Can you describe how SAP DMLT department is involved in such conversion project (phases: data analysis, scenarios, test system, go live and productive support)?
    Ans: DMLT team will be involved on project engagement basis under professional consulting contract with clear scope of deliverables and timelines. They follow the mock/test execution using SAP proprietary tool sets, taking fresh copy of production system with multiple mock cycles before applying anything on the live production system. In general, depends on the complexity scaling it can be at least 2 to 3 mock execution required before final go-live.

Hope this information helps you to make the decision suitably.

Best Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: Re: How to reset SAP* password..
entry.content: Cbo

entry.title: Re: Adobe Forms debugging on different systems using BREAK-POINT ID
entry.content: Interesting thread. Thanks for the tips.

entry.title: Shelf Life/Expiry Date check at goods issue of a process Order
entry.content:
I have 1 Raw Material, let's call it "RM1" which is used in 2 finished material lets say "FG1" and "FG2".

"FG1" has an SLED period of 36 month maintained in the material master.

"FG 2" has an SLED period of 24 months maintained in the material master.

I have the below batches of "RM1" in stock.

Batch 0012345 - Expiry Date 04/2026 (25 months from today)

Batch 0012346 - Expiry Date 04/2027 (37 months from today)

Batch 0012347 - Expiry Date 07/2027 (40 months from today)

I want batch determination to follow FEFO strategy for process order but also not pick a raw material that has SLED period lesser than the SLED period of the header FG material.

So in the above example, FG1 which has an SLED period of 36 months, should only pick batches 0012346 and 0012347. FG2 can pick 0012345, 0012346 and 0012347.

entry.title: Re: PMGM form visibility to indirect reports
entry.content:
Hi Shananna  ,

If you want a particular role to see that form then that role should be part of Route Map then they can see the forms.

Thanks

Mridul

entry.title: Re: Deprecated features in Latest Goal Management

Hello,

Jiho Seo

entry.title: How to maintain tax codes in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
I'm not sure if this is an SSCUI or app.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to maintain tax codes in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content: Please use SSCUI 101016 'Define Tax Codes for Sales and Purchases' for this purpose. Please see also 'Time Dependent Taxes' so you can create and edit your own tax rates and validity periods - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/8fd78f3974b84e478dc99ae1ae1afc16.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: How is tax code determined in Sales Order when Condit...
entry.content: For your tax condition type MWR1, standard Account Key MWS is assigned. Go to OB40, select this Account Key and double click on "Rules" tab where you can see all tax codes assigned to that Account Key. Also check in FTXP, where you can see the tax percentage would have been assigned to this condition type

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements app is not returning data after in...
entry.content:
@ansonabraham 

Is there any message in the error response?

entry.title: Re: Deprecated features in Latest Goal Management
entry.content: @jihoseo yes you can still retrieve it via API or Reporting, please refer to the Notes section in the help doc guide I provided: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PERFORMANCE_AND_GOALS/4a24e48b5c384b18a81f6b661305021e/61668959628a4ca8bfa243e71934e511.html

entry.title: Re: How to read row details of the variant table in SAP IMA11 using GUI Script
entry.content: same issue i am facing....any update on this ?

entry.title: Re: Overall delivery status issue
entry.content: From a sales order perspective SAP considers the order fully delivered if you all your items are assigned to a delivery but it doesn't necessarily mean the order has been shipped yet. It takes a bit getting used to.

entry.title: Re: Create XML Files XSD-compliant exploiting SPROXY functionalities and XSLT transformation
entry.content:
This blog is to generate XML from ABAP.
Could this method also be used to transform from XML to ABAP?

entry.title: Re: STMS Reconfiguration for SAP System after Refresh.
entry.content:
Hello,

well detailed explanation. However, I would prefer to avoid manual activities in the (usually time limited and stressful) process of a system refresh and use the method the PCA tool (Post Copy Automation) does it: do a backup of the TMS tables before and restore them after the system refresh. In case you have a license to use the PCA tool you should use it (resp. LAMA). If not, the PCA tool can not be executed but it can be used to get the information of the relevant tables. Just google for "SAP system refresh SCTC_LIST_TABLES" and / or "Saving system specific tables using R3trans".

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: How to post document to backend through BAPI in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am working on a requirement where I need to post document  to the SAP backend System through BAPI using Action Group from SAP Build Process Automation. The document is stored in local system. For posting document I am using below BAPI :

BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2

could you please give me any suggestion or any help how I can achieve this.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Re: Multi-Tenant CAP application - Integration in Build Work-Zone via IFrame
entry.content:
Hey Timo, 

thank you for the blog post.

Did you continue on this problem?
We're currently also working on a solution since the Portal Service got deprecated.

We figured out that you can use the ushell service adapters (resources\sap\ushell\appRuntime\ui5\services) to use the postMessage API internally while being integrated into the normal services API.
But we still need to find a good config for the "sap.ushellConfig.ui5appruntime" in order to use them.

Thanks and Regards,

Florian

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations on your S
entry.content:
Hello,

We have been testing the detailed behavior of CTC on transporting Business Rules. In the basis we are happy with the result and continue testing with Time Objects.

However, there is an existing system limitation on the business rules feature itself: it holds no history on who edited the rule and when; it simply gets overwritten with every change. As a work around, we insert records on every update on a rule which gives us insight in the editor and when it was updated.

To overcome this, we have created an influence request for the business rules feature to have a history log.

This shortcoming in business rules gets more visible when transporting business rules using CTC: all these records get overwritten with the same editor and time stamp.

Mentioning this here because the outcome of our influence request might be of value for other CTC users. For us it is currently a reason not to use CTC on business rules.

Should the request lead to an actual enhancement of the business rules feature, I'm curious to see how CTC handles the transport.

Thanks!
Roos

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/296168/?section=sectionDetails

entry.title: Re: Navigate to a sub-structure of a View Cluster containing another view.
entry.content:
Hello,
We need to do something similar but accessing the V_TKA02 view.
The need is to insert a new trading partner to a given company code.
With the above we access the view, but at the time of clicking "new entries" the co reported company is lost.
Any idea how to do it?
thanks

entry.title: Re: Transport from Dev Tenant to Test Tenant
entry.content:
Hi.

Objects developed in DEV system can be transported across the entire landscape to QA and PROD systems without using ABAPGit.


In general, steps to transport your development are the following:

  1. Create ABAP package.
  2. Make Development.
  3. Add your objects to TR.
  4. Release your TR on DEV system.
  5. Import your TR on QA system.

First, we need to say, that ABAP package which contains your development must has correct Transport Properties: Transport Layer and Software Component. It other words, it must be transportable.

Also very important thing that DEV and TEST systems must have same version, in other case you will get and error and would not be able to import your development.

So, in details, steps to transport your development into Test system.
1 Create Transport Request (TR).
2 Make development, add objects to your TR.
3 Find and open tab Transport Organizer in ABAP Perspective.


4 Find your TR, release (right-mouse click -> Release OR F9) all subtasks first and task then.

After that you will message that TR released successfully.

 

5 After TR was released from DEV, it should be imported on QA. In general case you should do it manually.
Open Fiori Launchpad that configured for QA system and run Import Collection App.

Find your TR in the list and open it.

6 Click Manual Import, it should check your TR for consistency and errors.

7 Click Manual Import and check your TR status, it should be Imported in case of success.

After that you can track the import status.

Hope it helpful for you.

Regards

Vitali

entry.title: Re: Cant access Enable Now Manager using either SSO or Fo...
entry.content: Hi Shane, we have done a trace and it appears that when in the office and connected to a LAN cable Enable Now is blocked. But if using office wifi it works. Would you know why it may be blocked using a LAN connection, is this likely a firewall issue? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations on your S
entry.content:
Hello,

We have been testing the detailed behavior of CTC on transporting Business Rules. In the basis we are happy with the result and continue testing with Time Objects.

However, there is an existing system limitation on the business rules feature itself: it holds no history on who edited the rule and when; it simply gets overwritten with every change. As a work around, we insert records on every update on a rule which gives us insight in the editor and when it was updated.

To overcome this, we have created an influence request for the business rules feature to have a history log.

This shortcoming in business rules gets more visible when transporting business rules using CTC: all these records get overwritten with the same editor and time stamp.

Mentioning this here because the outcome of our influence request might be of value for other CTC users. For us it is currently a reason not to use CTC on business rules. 

Should the request lead to an actual enhancement of the business rules feature, I'm curious to see how CTC handles the transport.

Thanks!
Roos

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/296168/?section=sectionDetails

entry.title: Re: Material status error not shown in Check Material Cov...
entry.content:
Hi,

MRP live doesn’t prevent execution as in MD02 even it’s blocked for MRP (MRP message=B) . After execution it will display the materials with errors or warning so that the planner can take actions in the next planning run. You can check  the usability of the app ‘Display MRP Master Data Issues’ Fiori app (F1425A)’

Or as a workaround update MRP type as ND for those obsolete materials.

Please refer to the below recently discussed question on the similar case.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/material-xxxx-status-obsolete-does-not-allow-the-planning-run/qaq-p/13636465/comment-id/4182169#M4182169

entry.title: Re: How to call API endpoint on BTP nodejs app from another BTP app?
entry.content: Hi Gregor, I have added uaa to the calling app (A), but to no avail... I think the problem is that app (A) calls app (B) without being triggered by a logged in user, but it runs on its own. Therefor, I don't have a token to forward which may causes the request to fail with a circular JSON parse error. But I would assume it should somehow be possible

entry.title: Template for PR and Supplier Invoice approver
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Good day!

As per checking, there is no available template for the submitted purchase requisitions, only for approved PRs, deadline notification and rejected PRs.

With this, please help confirm if there is available template for the approver of PR


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Template for PR and Supplier Invoice approver
entry.content:
Dear user , you can find the reply to this question on the Documentation page link :

 

You can configure the system so that approvers receive email notifications when a work item is created. By default, approvers are also informed by means of notifications in the SAP Fiori launchpad. Copy the predelivered email template SWF_CRT_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS into the custom name space. The custom template must follow the following pattern:
  • <YY1>_<Scenario ID>_CRT_ALL> or
  • <YY1_<Scenario ID>_CRT_<Node_ID>

For example:

For more information about the configuration of the Maintain Email Templates app, see How to Configure the Flexible Workflow for Purchase Requisitions. In the interactive graphic, choose the Optional: Maintain Email Templates section.

thanks 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Update, Insert, Delete, Modify in Cloud BADI using de...
entry.content:
Hi Shadab!!

Greetings!!

We even have the same requirement , can you please tell me how you solved this case of checking budget before PO in s/4 cloud? And what badi you used to update the bo ?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: API operations for Custom Business Objects in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Thank you!!

Is it possible to update Custom BO from BADI in S/4 Cloud ?

entry.title: Re: Release strategy for Requisition created on Projects...
entry.content: Do not plan for complex release process for PR created from CJ20N with network number/s or WBS element/s! Better have a separate PR document type for project system ( such as ZPNB) and while creating PR from CJ20N- system should create PR with only ZPNB PR document type but make sure in your  release process for PR you should have PR document type as ZPNB value in your PR release strategy.

entry.title: Use of Post B/S Reclassification to Reclass Lease Liability from CLREM/CLM/REFX Module
entry.content:
In connection to the 2022 SAP blog on Post B/S Reclassification for Correct Presentation of Financial Statements, I’d like to ask the same question posted in the comment section if it is now possible to reclass lease liability posted in CLREM/CLM/REFX module in PCE and/or S4HC. 

I also saw your response to a question in 2023 that it is possible to reclass G/L balances such as bank accounts. I believe that if it can now support bank accounts, then, lease liability should also be supported. But kindly confirm my assumption. Thank you!!!

@Ulrich_Hauke #advancedvaluation

entry.title: Re: How Periodic Billing Plan is Generated for Service Contract Items
entry.content:
Hello, 

We have a situation that a contract of one year can be auto renewed with one year. So we send a new invoice for one year. Only in the Netherlands the customer can then cancel his/her contract after 3 months and we must send a credit to customer, only when this is a tacit renewal. Can this be calculated automatically within the billing plan if we set a cancel date? 

I am used to Sales periodic billing contracts could do this, is this also possible within Service contract periodic billing? 

I know this can be done manually to create a credit memo, only employee needs to calculate this manually. Is it also possible to calculate en create automatic settlement credits for this billing plan item? 

Same situation only different scenario, we have 3 types of contract. If contract 1 € 3,50 a month is invoiced for 1 year in advance and customer upgrades his contract after 3 months to type 3 (€ 9,95 a month). How can we send a settlement for this, so we only invoice the extra amount. 

So 3 months for € 3,50 = € 10,50 
9 months for € 9,95 = €89.55

Total € 100,05 

Already invoiced = € 3,50 * 12 months = € 42

Item 1 Contract 1 a €3,50 = credit of €31,5 euro's 
Item 2 Contract 3 a € 9,95 = Debit €89.55

Total debit invoice = € 58.05

Can this settlement done automatically with cancellation of item 1 after 3 months? I can not see this working at this moment in public cloud. All needs to be done manually, or do I miss something? 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Fetch Distinct Values using For loop and Cursor in SAP HANA.
entry.content:
It looks like you posted the same question twice. Could you delete the redundant post?

For the SQL, what results do you get when (if you can) you execute the statement directly against the database? In other words, how certain are you that the answer must be 10?

entry.title: Stay certified: SAP moves to role-based and skills-based certifications
entry.content:
It’s no secret that companies are changing faster than ever. 
Now more than ever, it’s important that upskilling and reskilling opportunities are available to help people and businesses continue to innovate and grow.  
 
That’s why our certification portfolio is refocusing on the jobs that we believe are most important to enable successful cloud adoption and SAP S/4HANA Cloud transformation.
 
Role-based certification model 
Already last year, a role-based certification model was introduced that focuses on the entire skill required to run a job instead of product features.  
 
Get and Stay Certified 
We’re now introducing the Get and Stay Certified model to better respond to new and fast-changing technologies and make it easier for you to learn.
With this new approach, you have access to all relevant updates for your role in terms of products, skills, and new technologies with tailored, skills-based delta content. 
We've also updated the validity period for certifications. Once you pass an assessment, your certification validity will be extended by 12 months from the completion date of the assessment. 
 
Stay Certified: What´s new 
 
Stay Certified Live Sessions 
With Stay Certified Live Sessions, you can prepare yourself specifically for the questions of recertification evaluation. After attending this live session, you are ready to try the test to stay certified.
 
Stay Certified Live Sessions 
 
Our role-based certifications help you identify your next career step, select your next learning goal, or certification opportunity.

entry.title: Re: Is uploading initial balance to SAP much easier and quicker than migrating historical data?
entry.content:
The first question probably has the standard consulting answer: it depends. Not enough detail to assess.

The second question: no, not really.

entry.title: unable to configure cloud connector configuration
entry.content:
during configure Cloud connector it showing error.

"An authorization problem occurred when downloading the configuration. Check the spelling of the subaccount name, user, and password. See 'Log And Trace Files' and in particular ljs_trace.log for details. Associated entries were logged on or around 2024-03-22 17:17:03,124 +0530. Consult SAP note 2461997 for possible remedies."

entry.title: CAP Hybrid development to hana cloud ssh tunnel
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am developing a CAP applications over Hana Cloud (2023.40.16 (QRC 4/2023) version) and I am unable to connect through a ssh tunnel. 

I've enabled-ssh with cf cli, restarted application, bound to the hana instance, and although the app is running fine in BTP, I can't connect for development, always get a ECONNECTION REFUSED (hana is only allowing BTP connections). When I try to connect I'm seeing some other ports being accesed but always get connection refused.

I'm using this to connect:
cf ssh -N -T <appname> -L 4443:<hana-url>:443

and then:

cds deploy --to hana --profile hybrid --tunnel 127.0.0.1:4443

Is there something else i am missing?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to calculate actual size of the DB for MaxDB system after client deletion?
entry.content:
.We have deleted a client from one of our system and total size is showing around 6TB, however it should be reduced post client deletion, as per couple of blogs i could see MaxDB dont need reorganize. I also tried the query select sum(usedsize/1024/1024) from sysinfo.tablesize where schemaname='<sapsid>' which gave a total size as 2.5TB.
However it is little bit confusing to get the exact size of actual data in the DB.

Is there any way to calculate the size of data?

entry.title: Re: Inbound Email integration from O365 to SAP S4HANA on SAP RISE
entry.content:
Here are 2 links that might help, but you may need to open a ticket with support.

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/smtp-technical-architecture-outbound-e-mail-microsoft-office-365-s-4-hana/ba-p/13544909
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/integrating-sap-cloud-platform-workflow-with-microsoft-outlook/ba-p/13428126

entry.title: Re: Change Filter in SAC table To Top 5/Bot 5 based on Dr...
entry.content:
@RAMNATH 

Create the dropdown for TOP5 and BOT5. Read the value of this dropdown, and based on the value rank the table.

var sel = Dropdown_1.getselectedkey(); This will return what was selected in dropdown.

if (sel === "TOP5" ) {
Table.rankBy({
	applyToEachDimension: false,
	direction: Direction.Horizontal, // or Direction.Vertical
    rankOrder: RankOrder.Top,   // or RankOrder.bottom
    relatedDimensions: <dimname>,//put your dim name
	value: 5
});

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: "Replace Bubble Style" in Producer can't replace the...
entry.content: That's because the Highlight isn't controlled by the Bubble Style resource. Instead, look in Playback Settings > General > Highlights.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Adapter Development - Multiple Wo...
entry.content: You were able to figure out any alternative approach (other than data store, staging in NFS) ? if Yes, please let us know.  I don't think there is any way for Cluster lock or worker node locking in CPI SFTP yet.

entry.title: Re: Master Derived role concept
entry.content: Very informative. Thanks Snehal

entry.title: Re: Maintain customer field with Fast Change in ME22N
entry.content:
If you have added your customer field to all required structures and it still doesn't show up in the fast change field list, you should run the report BALVBUFDEL to clear the ALV buffer.

This is mentioned in SAP Note 2124015 (2124015 - Fast Change: fields that can/cannot be changed in ME21N and ME22N - SAP for Me)

I had this happen to me twice and the report always solved this problem.

 

Kind regards

Christian

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI to Microsoft SharePoint Adapter Integration
entry.content:
Hi Joel, 
Could you please guide in letting know what should be given in the token service URL ?

entry.title: Re: Implementing Dynamic Case Flows Based on Case Type
entry.content: Very well articulated, Best Wishes!

entry.title: Re: Criticality Annotation in Analytical List Page is incorrectly formatted
entry.content:
Your suggestion seemed like a great solution, but doesn't work for me. 

Regardless of what we do, it needs the Criticality field to be part of UI.lineItems, ie. a column in the table, otherwise it doesn't read it. I even tried RequestAtleast annotation, but still doesn't work.

It just needs to be part of the table.

Seems like a bug to me, ... no one would want to display a Cirticality field in a table, ever.

entry.title: From Code to Logic: XML to Business Rule Shift
entry.content:
INTRODUCTION

SAP SuccessFactors users have utilized XML-based workflows to define and execute their business processes. While XML workflows offer flexibility, they often require technical expertise and can be challenging to maintain. With the introduction of Business Rules, users now have a more intuitive and user-friendly alternative for managing workflows.

XML Workflows

  • XML (eXtensible Markup Language) workflows in SuccessFactors typically refer to traditional workflow configurations defined using XML-based code. These workflows are often manually coded and customized to fit specific business processes.
  • XML workflows require technical expertise for implementation and maintenance. They involve writing XML code to define workflow logic, conditions, approvals, and notifications.
  • XML workflows can be highly customizable but may be complex to modify or adapt as business needs evolve.

Business Rule Workflows:

  • Business rule workflows focus on defining rules, conditions, and decision logic using a visual interface. These workflows are typically more flexible and easier to maintain compared to XML workflows, as they allow for quicker modifications and updates to business rules without extensive coding efforts.
  • Business rule workflows are suitable for scenarios where business users need more control over defining and managing workflow logic without heavy reliance on technical expertise.

Using XML files to trigger workflows requires access to Provisioning and demands high skill levels of users. Business rules, which are defined by users themselves in the Admin Center, offer a more intuitive and more flexible way to perform the same job.

Deprecation of XML File-Based Workflow Triggering

The feature of triggering workflows through XML files (YouCalc rules) will reach the End of Development on November 17, 2023, and be deleted on November 17, 2025. This has been announced by SAP during the H2 2023 release.

Starting from the second half of 2023, new customers won't be able to use XML files to start workflows anymore. They'll only be able to use business rules. For already existing customer, SAP suggests moving the existing rules from XML files to business rules before the specified date.

Migrate XML rules to Business Rules: Workflow Derivation

Migrating from XML Rules (youCalc rules engine) for HRIS to Business Rules for Workflow Derivation requires careful planning and testing as this is a manual process.

There is no automated way for partners or customers to migrate from youCalc to Business Rule Derivation for Workflows. There is no confirmed auto migration on the roadmap for a future release. 

In this blog, I will outline the necessary steps for a seamless switch from XML-based workflows to Workflow Derivation Business Rules. 

Before implementing changes in the live system, it's best to first try them out in a Development or Test environment. Once everything works smoothly, we can move the changes to the live system.

Step 1: Create a backup copy of the XML file.

Login into Provisioning -> Import/Export Rules XML for Workflow Derivation. Click on the export radio button and Submit. An XML file with all workflows will be exported.

This file holds all the current workflows, allowing for analysis and redesign if needed, while also serving as a backup for future reference.

Step 2: Transform the workflows from XML to Excel

Copy the relevant workflow information from the XML file and paste it into an Excel spreadsheet. You may need to organize the data into columns and rows to represent different workflow elements such as steps, conditions, triggers, etc. Format the Excel workbook as needed to make the workflow information more readable and organized.

Step 3: Review and Validate

Review the transformed workflow information in Excel to ensure accuracy and completeness. Validate that all workflow elements have been correctly transferred from the XML file to the Excel spreadsheet. You may also consider creating multiple sheets within the workbook to represent different workflows or workflow categories.

This sheet will also be useful for designing business rule-based workflows and constructing them with the guidance provided in the Excel document.

Step 4: Enable Business Rules for Workflow Derivation

Login into Provisioning -> Click on Company Settings, and check the option "Enable Business Rules for Workflow Derivation". 

Note: Once this option is selected, the checkbox labeled "Import/Export Rules XML for Workflow Derivation" mentioned previously will vanish. Therefore, ensure that you have taken a backup of the XML beforehand.

Step 5: Create Business Rules

We've generated an Excel sheet outlining the essential conditions, triggers, actions, and outcomes required for the workflow's optimal functionality.

Proceed to "Manage Business Rules" within the instance, then click on the "Create" button. Select the relevant object and construct the rule according to the specified conditions and required execution.

Please note, that workflows would already exist under - Manage Organisation, Pay, and Job Structures. Hence we will create the logic in the IF section and set the workflow to get triggered under the THEN condition. 

Save the business rule once created.

Step 6 - Assign the Business Rule

After completing the creation of all business rules, they must be assigned within "Manage Business Configuration" depending upon which base object is selected. Please note workflows will be assigned on Event Type - OnSave.

Save the changes under Manage Business Configuration.

Step 7: Test the Business Rules

End-to-end testing is required to check and confirm if business rules are working as expected or not. Positive as well as Negative testing needs to be done. Also, a rule trace can be created to backtrack the working of a business rule.

The testing helps the business to sign off before moving the changes to production and a chance to validate the working of all workflows including if any changes are required either in logic or workflow approvers.

 

CONCLUSION

We have explored the transition from XML-based workflows to Business Rules within SAP SuccessFactors. By following the outlined steps, business can streamline their workflow management processes, enhance agility, and ensure compliance with evolving business needs. Leveraging Excel sheets for workflow analysis and Business Rules for execution provides a user-friendly approach, reducing dependency on complex coding.

Please note, that testing in a Development/Test environment is key before implementation in Production.

I hope this guide has been informative and helpful. Should you have any questions or need further assistance, don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you for taking the time to read through this blog 🙂

Happy Learning! Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Batch expiry date consideration in aATP
entry.content:
Hi Jayne,

thanks for raising the question and add the small example which makes the requirement understandable. There is no possibility to achieve the behavior without assigning a batch. The ATP check on batch level is supported.

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Fiori OVP $batch pointing to sap?sap-client...
entry.content:
Hello,

I am having a problem with a Fiori Overview Page I am trying to develop. In the manifest.json I set up the card like this: 

 "sap.ovp": {
    "globalFilterModel": "mainModel",
    "globalFilterEntityType": "SalesOverviewTop",
    "containerLayout": "resizable",
    "enableLiveFilter": true,
    "considerAnalyticalParameters": false,
    "cards": {
      "donutCard": {
        "model": "mainModel",
        "template": "sap.ovp.cards.v4.charts.analytical",
        "settings": {
          "title": "{{cardDonutTitle}}",
          "entitySet": "DonutMonthly",
          "sortBy": "SumNetAmount",
          "chartAnnotationPath": "com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.Chart#donutCard",
          "dataPointAnnotationPath": "com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.DataPoint#quDpSum"
        }
      }
    },

The CDS-View for the Card (DonutMonthly) looks like this:

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'AT RAP OVP Interface Summary of Orders'

@UI: {

  chart: [{
    qualifier: 'donutCard',
    chartType: #DONUT,
    measures: ['SumNetAmount'],
    dimensions: ['CalendarMonthNameTxt'],
    measureAttributes: [{ measure: 'SumNetAmount', role: #AXIS_1 }],
    dimensionAttributes: [{ dimension: 'CalendarMonthNameTxt', role: #CATEGORY }]
    
  }]
}

@UI.presentationVariant: [
  {
    maxItems: 5,
    sortOrder: [{ by: 'SumNetAmount', direction: #DESC }],
    qualifier: 'StandardDonut',
    requestAtLeast: [ 'SalesMonth', 'CalendarMonthNameTxt','SumNetAmount','TransactionCurrency' ]
  }
]

define view entity ZI_SO_C_SUM as select from ZI_SO_T_OVP 
association[1] to I_CalendarMonthText on I_CalendarMonthText.CalendarMonth = $projection.SalesMonth
                                  and I_CalendarMonthText.Language = $session.system_language

{
    @UI.identification: [{ type: #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION,
                           semanticObject: 'ZSalesOrderFs',
                           qualifier: 'semNavigation',
                           semanticObjectAction: 'manage' }]
    @UI.selectionField: [{ position: 10, qualifier: 'quSalesMonth' }] 
    @UI.lineItem: [{position: 10 }]
    key SalesMonth,
    @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 20 }]
    case SalesMonth
        when (substring($session.system_date, 5,2) )
            then 'This Month'
        else 
            I_CalendarMonthText.CalendarMonthName
    end as CalendarMonthNameTxt,
    
    @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'
    @UI.dataPoint: {
        qualifier: 'quDpSum',
        title: 'DP Title Sum',
        description: 'DP Descr Sum'
     }
    sum(TotalNetAmount) as SumNetAmount,
    
    TransactionCurrency
    
    //Associations

} group by SalesMonth, I_CalendarMonthText.CalendarMonthName, TransactionCurrency

I noticed when looking at the network requests in the browser developer tools that the $batch request payload looks like this: 

GET sap?sap-client=710&$apply=aggregate(SumNetAmount%20with%20sum%20as%20SumNetAmountAgg)&$skip=0&$top=1 HTTP/1.1

Note that it starts with sap?sap-client... 
This then leads to error 404, here the response message
{"error":{"code":"/IWCOR/CX_OD_URI_NOT_MATCHING","message":"Resource not found for segment 'sap'"...

While in another app the request payload starts like this:

GET SalesOrder?sap-client=710&$count=true&$select=DeliveryDateCriticality,OrderType,

Here it starts off with the name of the Entity, I think this might be the reason.

Could you please help me with this? 

Thanks in advance and kind Regards,
Stephan

entry.title: Re: Product Allocation tables
entry.content:
Hi Basuari,

I am not sure if I have understood the question. Is it about database table names or is it about extensibility on those tables etc?

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: How to identify if a role is read or write in SAP R/3 ?
entry.content:
ACTVT isn't an authorization object , it's a, frequently used, authorization field

Look within SU21

SUIM can only filter in this activity for an explicit autorization object (every object doesn't contain it)

Did you already execute a SQL trace on PFCG or SUIM to get a list of relevant tables ?

entry.title: Re: CO88 and OKG8 Relationship?
entry.content: Hi Sumesh, I checked in OKG8 for the Cost elelement assigned to RA Category POCI /POCS. It's cost element 931000. And yes, it's category 31 cost element. But then I looked for this cost element in OKG4, and there it's not there...what next 🙂

entry.title: Sharing Performance Review with Previous Manager
entry.content: Our performance reviews have been completed but some managers have not yet communicated the reviews with their employees. We recently had an employee change managers and the previous manager that completed the review did not share the review with the employee yet. Is there a way to send the review to the previous manager without changing the employee's manager back to previous manager? Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Annotation to hide criticality variable from UI display
entry.content: If you omit the criticality from the table, it doesn't work. It needs the criticality field to be one of the LineItems. Seems to be a bug.

entry.title: planning versus budget enterprise project
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Can somebody explain to me the difference between budget (BUDGET01) and planning (PLN). Both are possible for to upload an excel sheet, but for the budget I can create an item direct in the system. I want to understand the SAP logic. If I see it correctly the PLN is used for the POC calculation, so is my understanding correct that you have to update you ETC via an excel sheet in Enterprise Projects (project with revenue)

Thanks,

Best regards,

Rene

entry.title: Re: Network Performance Analysis for SAP Netweaver ABAP
entry.content: Chris, This brilliant insight and explanation is much appreciated. Many thanks for that!

entry.title: Re: SAP Convergent Charging - Upgrade from 5.0.6.X to 202X
entry.content: Thanks, Eric!

entry.title: Default logic not triggering while saving data in input form
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While I am saving data in the input template, The default logic is not Triggering.

But If I am running the package through the data manager it works.

Any Suggestions?

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 1
entry.content:
{
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "type": "sap.dmo.dvh.Vehicle.Alerts.v1",
  "source": "/eu10/sap.dmo.dvh",
  "subject": "808E6E30B65149978A443429B29FB300",
  "id": "a823e884-5edc-4194-a81a-f3a3632417ee",
  "time": "2018-04-08 08:31:00",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "sappassport": "string",
  "data": {
    "vehicleIdentifyingElements": {
      "id": "808E6E30B65149978A443429B29FB300",
      "externalID": "vehicle-008",
      "vin": "1234567898888888"
    }
  }
}

entry.title: Re: Batch expiry date consideration in aATP
entry.content: Thanks for confirming this Andreas, is there anything expected in future releases to make a more flexible solution as only one batch can be assigned to a sales order line

entry.title: Re: How to call API endpoint on BTP nodejs app from another BTP app?
entry.content:
Ok, I guess I'll have to buy you a 🍻 Gregor, for taking up your valuable time. The error turned out to be between chair and keyboard..... The circular JSON error I wasn't able to pinpoint in the NPM module turned out to be originating from this line in my code:

 

logger.info(`Request OK: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);

 

because apparently executeHttpRequest returns the whole response object, not just the response data. Changing it to

 

logger.info(`Request OK: ${JSON.stringify(data.data)}`);

 

returned the expected response just fine and apparently I have wasted quite some hours debugging something that already worked just fine... 🤡

entry.title: Re: Batch expiry date consideration in aATP
entry.content:
Hi Jayne,

as of now there is no plan to add a shelf life capability. Feel free to use customer influence portal to create a request and trigger a discussion.

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: SAP BI 4.2 SP5 - Promotion Management Wizard
entry.content:
Hi, 

I've just setup a new server to migrate to. At the Promotion Management Wizard > Scenario Step stage, how do I populate the server name drop down for the source,  as it isn't a free-type field? 

Currently it only lists the server I'm running the promotion management wizard from.  

 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Hierarchy View of Trial Balance Using /C_TRIALBALANCE API
entry.content:
How to get a Hierarchical view of Trial Balance using API C_TRIALBALANCE?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Hierarchy View of Trial Balance Using /C_TRIALBALANCE...
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, 

 

Unfortunately, as of now it is not possible to get a Hierarchical View by using the API C_TRIALBALANCE.

In order to get a trial balance with hierarchical view please follow the steps below:

  1. Trial Balance App.
  2. Enter input parameters.
  3. Adapt Filters.
  4. Include G/L Hierarchy and G/L Hierarchy (Node).
  5. Input both fields.
  6. Go.
  7. The display now filters the G/L Hierarchy.

 

I hope this helps!

 

Best Regards,

SAP Product Support

entry.title: Navigate to a sub-structure V_TKA02 of a View Cluster containing another view.
entry.content:
Hello,

we need do something similar to https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/navigate-to-a-sub-structure-of-a-view-cluster-containing-another-view/m-p/12161008.

The need is to insert a new trading partner to a given company code.
We access the view, but at the time of clicking "new entries" or do scroll the co reported company is lost.
Any idea how to do it?
thanks

entry.title: Re: How to clear old tasks on SuccessFactors dashboard
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Do we have any solution where active tasks like assign a buddy and recommended links to be archive from Dashboard after certain period even the tasks is not completed. .

entry.title: Re: How to call API endpoint on BTP nodejs app from anoth...
entry.content:
Well, apparently it was working correctly all along:

The error turned out to be between chair and keyboard. The circular JSON error I wasn't able to pinpoint in the NPM module turned out to be originating from this line in my code:

logger.info(`Request OK: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);

because apparently executeHttpRequest returns the whole response object, not just the response data.

Changing it to

logger.info(`Request OK: ${JSON.stringify(data.data)}`);

returned the expected response just fine and apparently I have wasted quite some hours debugging something that already worked just fine...

entry.title: Re: planning versus budget enterprise project
entry.content:
Hi Rene,

the planning categories are basically related to different use cases. PLN planning category is to plan project values and to compare them to actual bookings in the multiple reports we have available. BUDGET01 planning category is related to budget availability control so in case you want to block e.g. actual cost postings because the budget is exceeded. PLN is typically "just" used for comparison reasons, it doesn't have technical effects on follow-up processes. 

Practically, if the budget availability control values are identical to your plan values, you could also just use BUDGET01 as the planning category field is available to select in most of the reports that we have available. Nevertheless, best practice recommends to distinguish PLN from BUDGET01 with BUDGET01 being solely used for availability control which is delivered through SSCUI Maintain Budget Availability Control Profile for Projects (102413).

Hope that helps
Johannes

entry.title: Re: Looking for a list of master data objects which are c...
entry.content:
Please check this SAP Community page for information about the different MDG versions in the private and public cloud. It also has information about the data model coverage of each version.

Generally, as of today...

  • SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition, master data governance is applicable for customer, supplier, product, and financial master data and provides openness for custom-defined objects. It also has SAP partner-based solution extensions featuring governance of enterprise asset and retail master data. For details on the data models, see the relevant chapters on this SAP Community How-To-Page.
  • SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition, master data governance is applicable for business partner (incl. customer, supplier) and product data.
  • SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition is applicable for business partner data. 

See also the SAP Community Topic main page for SAP Master Data Governance.

entry.title: Isle of Man (IM country code) country needs to be sent as GB in documentation for Dutch Customs
entry.content: I have a requirement for Dutch customs for shipments coming from Isle of Man (country code IM) to come across with country code GB. I thought maybe somewhere on the country setup there would be a place to put this type of alternate country code that I could then just refer to and pull for documentation sent to Dutch customs but I am not seeing anything. Is there any suggestions or guidance for this type of issue - I know of at least 3 country codes (I believe they are called British Crown Dependencies) where the actual code is one thing but at least Dutch customs requires GB instead. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP BI 4.2 SP5 - Promotion Management Wizard
entry.content:
The first time you will need to manually type in the name of Server, once you have actually run the job at least once the name will show up in the drop down list next time.  Initially it only shows the name of the Server where the PMW is run because that is the only server it is aware of.

Ajay
